text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لَمَّا أَخْرَجَ ذُرِّيَّةَ آدَمَ ( عليه السلام ) مِنْ ظَهْرِهِ لِيَأْخُذَ عَلَيْهِمُ الْمِيثَاقَ بِالرُّبُوبِيَّةِ لَهُ وَ بِالنُّبُوَّةِ لِكُلِّ نَبِيٍّ فَكَانَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ أَخَذَ لَهُ عَلَيْهِمُ الْمِيثَاقَ بِنُبُوَّتِهِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )

ثُمَّ قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لآِدَمَ انْظُرْ مَا ذَا تَرَى قَالَ فَنَظَرَ آدَمُ ( عليه السلام ) إِلَى ذُرِّيَّتِهِ وَ هُمْ ذَرٌّ قَدْ مَلَئُوا السَّمَاءَ قَالَ آدَمُ ( عليه السلام ) يَا رَبِّ مَا أَكْثَرَ ذُرِّيَّتِي وَ لِأَمْرٍ مَا خَلَقْتَهُمْ فَمَا تُرِيدُ مِنْهُمْ بِأَخْذِكَ الْمِيثَاقَ عَلَيْهِمْ قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَعْبُدُونَنِي لَا يُشْرِكُونَ بِي شَيْئاً وَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِرُسُلِي وَ يَتَّبِعُونَهُم

قَالَ آدَمُ ( عليه السلام ) يَا رَبِّ فَمَا لِي أَرَى بَعْضَ الذَّرِّ أَعْظَمَ مِنْ بَعْضٍ وَ بَعْضَهُمْ لَهُ نُورٌ كَثِيرٌ وَ بَعْضَهُمْ لَهُ نُورٌ قَلِيلٌ وَ بَعْضَهُمْ لَيْسَ لَهُ نُورٌ فَقَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ كَذَلِكَ خَلَقْتُهُمْ لِأَبْلُوَهُمْ فِي كُلِّ حَالَاتِهِمْ

قَالَ آدَمُ ( عليه السلام ) يَا رَبِّ فَتَأْذَنُ لِي فِي الْكَلَامِ فَأَتَكَلَّمَ قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ تَكَلَّمْ فَإِنَّ رُوحَكَ مِنْ رُوحِي وَ طَبِيعَتَكَ [مِنْ] خِلَافِ كَيْنُونَتِي قَالَ آدَمُ يَا رَبِّ فَلَوْ كُنْتَ خَلَقْتَهُمْ عَلَى مِثَالٍ وَاحِدٍ وَ قَدْرٍ وَاحِدٍ وَ طَبِيعَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ وَ جِبِلَّةٍ وَاحِدَةً وَ أَلْوَانٍ وَاحِدَةٍ وَ أَعْمَارٍ وَاحِدَةٍ وَ أَرْزَاقٍ سَوَاءٍ لَمْ يَبْغِ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَى بَعْضٍ وَ لَمْ يَكُنْ بَيْنَهُمْ تَحَاسُدٌ وَ لَا تَبَاغُضٌ وَ لَا اخْتِلَافٌ فِي شَيْ‏ءٍ مِنَ الْأَشْيَاءِ

قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَا آدَمُ بِرُوحِي نَطَقْتَ وَ بِضَعْفِ طَبِيعَتِكَ تَكَلَّفْتَ مَا لَا عِلْمَ لَكَ بِهِ وَ أَنَا الْخَالِقُ الْعَالِمُ بِعِلْمِي خَالَفْتُ بَيْنَ خَلْقِهِمْ وَ بِمَشِيئَتِي يَمْضِي فِيهِمْ أَمْرِي وَ إِلَى تَدْبِيرِي وَ تَقْدِيرِي صَائِرُونَ لَا تَبْدِيلَ لِخَلْقِي

إِنَّمَا خَلَقْتُ الْجِنَّ وَ الْإِنْسَ لِيَعْبُدُونِ وَ خَلَقْتُ الْجَنَّةَ لِمَنْ أَطَاعَنِي وَ عَبَدَنِي مِنْهُمْ وَ اتَّبَعَ رُسُلِي وَ لَا أُبَالِي وَ خَلَقْتُ النَّارَ لِمَنْ كَفَرَ بِي وَ عَصَانِي وَ لَمْ يَتَّبِعْ رُسُلِي وَ لَا أُبَالِي

وَ خَلَقْتُكَ وَ خَلَقْتُ ذُرِّيَّتَكَ مِنْ غَيْرِ فَاقَةٍ بِي إِلَيْكَ وَ إِلَيْهِمْ وَ إِنَّمَا خَلَقْتُكَ وَ خَلَقْتُهُمْ لِأَبْلُوَكَ وَ أَبْلُوَهُمْ أَيُّكُمْ أَحْسَنُ عَمَلًا فِي دَارِ الدُّنْيَا فِي حَيَاتِكُمْ وَ قَبْلَ مَمَاتِكُمْ فَلِذَلِكَ خَلَقْتُ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةَ وَ الْحَيَاةَ وَ الْمَوْتَ وَ الطَّاعَةَ وَ الْمَعْصِيَةَ وَ الْجَنَّةَ وَ النَّارَ

وَ كَذَلِكَ أَرَدْتُ فِي تَقْدِيرِي وَ تَدْبِيرِي وَ بِعِلْمِيَ النَّافِذِ فِيهِمْ خَالَفْتُ بَيْنَ صُوَرِهِمْ وَ أَجْسَامِهِمْ وَ أَلْوَانِهِمْ وَ أَعْمَارِهِمْ وَ أَرْزَاقِهِمْ وَ طَاعَتِهِمْ وَ مَعْصِيَتِهِمْ فَجَعَلْتُ مِنْهُمُ الشَّقِيَّ وَ السَّعِيدَ وَ الْبَصِيرَ وَ الْأَعْمَى وَ الْقَصِيرَ وَ الطَّوِيلَ وَ الْجَمِيلَ وَ الدَّمِيمَ وَ الْعَالِمَ وَ الْجَاهِلَ وَ الْغَنِيَّ وَ الْفَقِيرَ وَ الْمُطِيعَ وَ الْعَاصِيَ وَ الصَّحِيحَ وَ السَّقِيمَ وَ مَنْ بِهِ الزَّمَانَةُ وَ مَنْ لَا عَاهَةَ بِهِ

فَيَنْظُرُ الصَّحِيحُ إِلَى الَّذِي بِهِ الْعَاهَةُ فَيَحْمَدُنِي عَلَى عَافِيَتِهِ وَ يَنْظُرُ الَّذِي بِهِ الْعَاهَةُ إِلَى الصَّحِيحِ فَيَدْعُونِي وَ يَسْأَلُنِي أَنْ أُعَافِيَهُ وَ يَصْبِرُ عَلَى بَلَائِي فَأُثِيبُهُ جَزِيلَ عَطَائِي وَ يَنْظُرُ الْغَنِيُّ إِلَى الْفَقِيرِ فَيَحْمَدُنِي وَ يَشْكُرُنِي وَ يَنْظُرُ الْفَقِيرُ إِلَى الْغَنِيِّ فَيَدْعُونِي وَ يَسْأَلُنِي وَ يَنْظُرُ الْمُؤْمِنُ إِلَى الْكَافِرِ فَيَحْمَدُنِي عَلَى مَا هَدَيْتُهُ

فَلِذَلِكَ خَلَقْتُهُمْ لِأَبْلُوَهُمْ فِي السَّرَّاءِ وَ الضَّرَّاءِ وَ فِيمَا أُعَافِيهِمْ وَ فِيمَا أَبْتَلِيهِمْ وَ فِيمَا أُعْطِيهِمْ وَ فِيمَا أَمْنَعُهُمْ وَ أَنَا اللَّهُ الْمَلِكُ الْقَادِرُ وَ لِي أَنْ أَمْضِيَ جَمِيعَ مَا قَدَّرْتُ عَلَى مَا دَبَّرْتُ وَ لِي أَنْ أُغَيِّرَ مِنْ ذَلِكَ مَا شِئْتُ إِلَى مَا شِئْتُ وَ أُقَدِّمَ مِنْ ذَلِكَ مَا أَخَّرْتُ وَ أُؤَخِّرَ مِنْ ذَلِكَ مَا قَدَّمْتُ وَ أَنَا اللَّهُ الْفَعَّالُ لِمَا أُرِيدُ لَا أُسْأَلُ عَمَّا أَفْعَلُ وَ أَنَا أَسْأَلُ خَلْقِي عَمَّا هُمْ فَاعِلُونَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Hisham Bin Salim, from Habeeb Al Sijistany who said,

‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic. When He<sup>azwj</sup> Extracted the offspring of Adam<sup>as</sup> from his<sup>as</sup> back in order to Take the Covenant with the Lordship for Himself<sup>azwj</sup>, and with the Prophet-hood for every Prohet<sup>as</sup>, so the first one He<sup>azwj</sup> Took the Covenant for Himself<sup>azwj</sup> upon him with his<sup>saww</sup> Prophet-hood was Muhammad Bin Abdullah<sup>saww</sup>.

Then Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Said to Adam<sup>as</sup>: “Look! What do you<sup>as</sup> see?” He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘So Adam<sup>as</sup> looked at his<sup>as</sup> children, and they were particles which had filled up the sky. Adam<sup>as</sup> said: ‘O Lord<sup>azwj</sup>! How abundant are my<sup>as</sup> children and for what matter have You<sup>azwj</sup> Created them? So what do You<sup>azwj</sup> Want from them by Taking the Covenant upon them?’ Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Said: “For them to be worshipping Me<sup>azwj</sup> not associating anything with Me<sup>azwj</sup>, and believing in My<sup>azwj</sup> Rasools<sup>as</sup> and following them<sup>as</sup>”.

Adam<sup>as</sup> said: ‘O Lord<sup>azwj</sup>! So what is the matter I<sup>as</sup> see some of the particles to be greater than the others, and some of them have a lot of light for them, and some of them are of little light, and some of them have no light for them?’ So Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Said: “Like that is how I<sup>azwj</sup> Created them in order to Try them in all their states”.

Adam<sup>as</sup> said: ‘O Lord<sup>azwj</sup>! So, could You<sup>azwj</sup> Permit me<sup>as</sup> regarding the speech, so I<sup>as</sup> can speak (to them)?’ Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Said: “Speak, for your<sup>as</sup> spirit is from My<sup>azwj</sup> Spirit, but your<sup>azwj</sup> nature is different from My<sup>azwj</sup> Being”. Adam<sup>as</sup> said: ‘O Lord<sup>azwj</sup>! If only You<sup>azwj</sup> had Created them upon one likeness, and of one measurement, and of one clay, and of one constitution, and of one colour, and of one age, and with the equal sustenance, some of them would not rebel against the others, and there would neither happen to be between them any envy, or hatred, or differing with regards to anything from the things’.

Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Said: “O Adam<sup>as</sup>! By My<sup>azwj</sup> Spirit you<sup>as</sup> speak, and by the weakness is in your<sup>as</sup> nature you<sup>as</sup> made the effort on what there is no knowledge for you<sup>as</sup> in it, and I<sup>azwj</sup> am the Creator, the Knowledgeable. With My<sup>azwj</sup> Knowledge I<sup>azwj</sup> Caused the difference in their Creation, and by My<sup>azwj</sup> Desire do I<sup>azwj</sup> Ordain My<sup>azwj</sup> Command among them, and to My<sup>azwj</sup> Management and My<sup>azwj</sup> Ordainment are they coming into being, there being no alteration in My<sup>azwj</sup> Creation.

But rather, I<sup>azwj</sup> Created the Jinn and the human beings for them to be worshipping Me<sup>azwj</sup>, and I<sup>azwj</sup> Created the Paradise for the one who obeys Me<sup>azwj</sup> and worships Me<sup>azwj</sup> from them, and follows My<sup>azwj</sup> Rasools<sup>as</sup>, and I<sup>azwj</sup> do not Retract; and I<sup>azwj</sup> Created the Fire for the one who disbelieve in Me<sup>azwj</sup>, and disobeys Me<sup>azwj</sup>, and does not follow My<sup>azwj</sup> Rasools<sup>as</sup>, and I<sup>azwj</sup> do not Retract.

And I<sup>azwj</sup> Created you<sup>as</sup> and your<sup>as</sup> offspring from without a need of Mine to you<sup>as</sup> and to them, and rather I<sup>azwj</sup> Created you<sup>as</sup> and Created them in order to Test you<sup>as</sup> and Test them, which ones of you is best of deeds in the house of the world during your lifetime and before your deaths. Thus, for that I<sup>azwj</sup> Created the world and the Hereafter, and the life and the death, and the obedience and the disobedience, and the Paradise and the Fire.

And like that, I<sup>azwj</sup> Intended in My<sup>azwj</sup> Ordainment and My<sup>azwj</sup> Management, and with My<sup>azwj</sup> Knowledge, the Implementation among them of the difference between their chests (consciences), and their bodies, and their colours, and their ages, and their sustenance, and their obedience, and their disobedience. So I<sup>azwj</sup> Made from them, the miserable, and the fortunate, and the seeing and the blind, and the short and the long, and the beautiful and the ugly, and the knowledgeable and the ignorant, and the rich and the poor, and the obedient and the disobedient, and the healthy and the sick, and the one with disabilities and the one with no handicap with him.

So the healthy would look at the one with the disability and he would Praise Me<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>; and the one with the disability would look at the healthy and he would supplicate to Me<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> and ask Me<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> for his good health and be patient upon My<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Affliction, so I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> would Grant him a lot of My<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Grants. And the rich would look at the poor and he would Praise Me<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> and thank Me<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>, and the poor would look at the rich and would suplicate to me and ask Me<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>. And the Believer would look at the disbeliever and he would Praise Me<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> upon what I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Guided him.

Thus, it is for that I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Created them in order to Test them during the ease and adversity, and regarding what I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Grant them good health and regarding what I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Test them, and regarding what I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Give them and regarding what I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Prevent them from; and I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> am Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>, the King, the Powerful, and for Me<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> is that I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Implement the entirety of what I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Ordain, and for Me<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> is that I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Change from that whatever I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> so Desire to whatever I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> so Desire, and I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Bring forward from that whatever I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> had Delayed, and Delay what I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> had Brought forward, and I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> am Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>. I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Do whatever I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Want. I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> will not be questioned about what I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Do, and I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> will be Questioning My<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> creatures about what they are doing”’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad and Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from Hisham ibn Salim from Habib al-Sajistani who has said the following: “I heard abu Ja’far (a.s.) saying, ‘There was a time when Allah, the Majestic, the Glorious, took the descendents of Adam from his back to establish a covenant with them to testify that He is their Lord and to believe in the prophethood of all the prophets. The first among the prophets whose prophethood Allah wanted them to accept through a covenant was Muhammad ibn ‘Abd Allah, recipient of divine supreme covenant. Allah, the Majestic, the Glorious, then said to Adam, “Look (to find) what you can see.” ‘The Imam then said, “Adam then looked and saw his descendents appearing as small particles that filled the sky. Adam then said, ‘Lord, how huge in number my descendents are! For what purpose have You created them and for what reason did You make them to establish a covenant with You?’” Allah, the Majestic, the Glorious, replied, “So that they worship Me and do not consider anything else as My equal and so that they believe in My messengers and follow them (for guidance).” Adam then asked, “Lord, why is it that I see certain ones of the particles are greater, others have a great deal of lights, yet others among them have very little light and still others among them have no lights at all?” Allah, the Majestic, the Glorious, replied, “Thus, I have created them to place them to test in every condition that they will live.” Adam then asked, “My Lord, will You grant me permission to speak so I may express myself?” Allah, the Majestic the Glorious said, “Speak up; your spirit is from My spirit but your nature is different from My being.” Adam then asked, “Lord, had You created them all just like each other, by the same measure, the same nature, of likewise design, of the same color, of equal life span, of equal amount of means of living they would not act against each other. No jealousy, animosity and differences would exist among them over anything.” Allah, the Majestic, the Glorious, said, “O Adam, through My spirit you just spoke and due to the weakness of your nature you made an effort to give an opinion about that of which you have no knowledge. I Am the Creator of the world. I knowingly have created each one different from the others and through My Own way I will make My commands to take effect and they will continue existing through My plans and measures. There will be no changes in My creation. I have created the Jinn and human beings only to worship Me. I have created paradise for those who obey and worship Me and follow My messengers. I have no regrets in what 1 have done. I have created the fire for those who disbelieve, disobey Me and do not follow My messengers and I have no regrets in it. I have created you and your descendents not because I ever need you or your descendents in anyway or form. I have created you and created them to test you and test them to see which ones among you do good deeds in the worldly life before your deaths. For this reason I have created the world and the life thereafter, life, death, obedience, disobedience, paradise and the fire. This is how I willed in My measure and plan. Through My all-pervasive knowledge in them I have placed differences in their forms, bodies, colors, lifespan, means of living, obedience and disobedience. I, thus, have made certain ones of them to be unfortunate or very fortunate. Certain ones among them will have eyesight or be blind, others among them will be of short size or tall ones, beautiful or otherwise, knowledgeable or ignorant, wealthy or poor, obedient or disobedient, of good health or suffering from illness, of defective bodies or free of bodily defects. In this way those of perfect bodies will look at the defective ones and thank Me for the perfect body that 1 have given them and those with defective bodies will look at the perfect ones and will pray to Me and ask Me to grant them good health and exercise patience when and in the way I test them. Thus, I will grant them good rewards. The wealthy ones after looking to the poor ones will thank Me and appreciate My favors. When the poor ones look to the wealthy ones they pray to Me and ask Me favors. It is as such so that the believers will look to the unbelievers and thank Me for the guidance that I have granted them. For such reasons I have created them. I test them in ease and in hardships and in good health that I grant them and in the matters with which I test them, in the matters of what I grant them and in the matters that 1 refuse them. I am Allah, the powerful King. It is all up to Me to allow all of My measures and plans to take form or change them as I wish to the time that I wish. I may change the sequel of the timing of my measures and plans and allow, that which comes first to come last and vice versa. I am Allah, and I execute whatever I will. I am not questioned for whatever I do but 1 question My creatures about their deeds.’””

translations.bn: মুহাম্মাদ ইবনে ইয়াহইয়া, মুহাম্মাদ ইবনে আল-হুসাইন থেকে, তিনি মুহাম্মাদ ইবনে ইসমাঈল থেকে, তিনি সালিহ ইবনে উকবা থেকে, তিনি আবদুল্লাহ ইবনে মুহাম্মাদ আল-জু'ফি এবং উকবা উভয়ের কাছ থেকে মিলিতভাবে, তারা আবু জাফর আলাইহিস সালাম থেকে বর্ণনা করেছেন যে তিনি বলেছেন:
translations.de: Muhammad ibn Yahya, von Muhammad ibn al-Husayn, von Muhammad ibn Isma'il, von Salih ibn Uqba, von Abdullah ibn Muhammad al-Ju'fi und Uqba, beide zusammen, von Abu Ja'far (Friede sei mit ihm), der sagte:
translations.en: Muhammad ibn Yahya, from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn, from Muhammad ibn Isma'il, from Salih ibn Uqba, from Abdullah ibn Muhammad al-Ju'fi and Uqba, both together, from Abu Ja'far (peace be upon him) who said:
translations.es: Muhammad ibn Yahya, de Muhammad ibn al-Husayn, de Muhammad ibn Isma'il, de Salih ibn Uqba, de Abdullah ibn Muhammad al-Ju'fi y Uqba, ambos juntos, de Abu Ja'far (la paz sea con él) quien dijo:
translations.fa: محمد بن یحیی از محمد بن الحسین، از محمد بن اسماعیل، از صالح بن عقبه، از عبدالله بن محمد الجعفی و عقبه هر دو با هم، از ابوجعفر علیه السلام روایت کرده‌اند که فرمود:
translations.fr: Muhammad ibn Yahya, de Muhammad ibn al-Husayn, de Muhammad ibn Isma'il, de Salih ibn Uqba, de Abdullah ibn Muhammad al-Ju'fi et Uqba, tous deux ensemble, de Abu Ja'far (que la paix soit sur lui) qui dit :
translations.id: Muhammad ibn Yahya, dari Muhammad ibn al-Husayn, dari Muhammad ibn Isma'il, dari Salih ibn Uqba, dari Abdullah ibn Muhammad al-Ju'fi dan Uqba keduanya bersama-sama, dari Abu Ja'far alaihis salam yang bersabda:
translations.ru: Мухаммад ибн Яхья, от Мухаммада ибн аль-Хусейна, от Мухаммада ибн Исмаила, от Салиха ибн Укбы, от Абдуллаха ибн Мухаммада аль-Джу'фи и Укбы вместе, от Абу Джа'фара (мир ему), который сказал:
translations.tr: Muhammed b. Yahya, Muhammed b. Hüseyin'den, o Muhammed b. İsmail'den, o Salih b. Ukbe'den, o Abdullah b. Muhammed el-Cu'fi ve Ukbe'den birlikte, onlar da Ebu Cafer (a.s.)'dan rivayet etmiştir ki buyurdu:
translations.ur: محمد بن یحییٰ نے، محمد بن الحسین سے، انہوں نے محمد بن اسماعیل سے، انہوں نے صالح بن عقبہ سے، انہوں نے عبد اللہ بن محمد الجعفی اور عقبہ دونوں نے مل کر، ابو جعفر علیہ السلام سے روایت کی کہ آپ نے فرمایا:
translations.zh: 穆罕默德·本·叶海亚从穆罕默德·本·侯赛因，他从穆罕默德·本·伊斯马仪，他从萨利赫·本·欧格白，他从阿卜杜拉·本·穆罕默德·朱尔菲和欧格白二人一同传述，他们从阿布·贾法尔（愿主赐他平安）传述，他说：

translations.bn: নিশ্চয়ই আল্লাহ আজ্জা ওয়া জাল্লা সমস্ত সৃষ্টি সৃষ্টি করলেন। তিনি যাদেরকে ভালোবাসতেন তাদেরকে যা থেকে ভালোবাসতেন তা থেকে সৃষ্টি করলেন, এবং তাঁর ভালোবাসার জিনিস হল তাদেরকে জান্নাতের মাটি থেকে সৃষ্টি করা; আর যাদেরকে ঘৃণা করতেন তাদেরকে যা থেকে ঘৃণা করতেন তা থেকে সৃষ্টি করলেন, এবং তাঁর ঘৃণার জিনিস হল তাদেরকে আগুনের মাটি থেকে সৃষ্টি করা। তারপর তাদেরকে ছায়াগুলিতে পাঠালেন।
translations.de: Wahrlich, Allah, der Mächtige und Majestätische, erschuf die Schöpfung. Er schuf diejenigen, die Er liebte, aus dem, was Er liebte, und das, was Er liebte, war, sie aus dem Lehm des Paradieses zu erschaffen; und Er schuf diejenigen, die Er hasste, aus dem, was Er hasste, und das, was Er hasste, war, sie aus dem Lehm des Feuers zu erschaffen. Dann sandte Er sie in die Schatten.
translations.en: Verily, Allah, Mighty and Majestic, created the creation. So He created those whom He loved from what He loved, and what He loved was that He created it from the clay of Paradise; and He created those whom He hated from what He hated, and what He hated was that He created it from the clay of the Fire. Then He sent them into the shadows.
translations.es: Ciertamente Allah, Poderoso y Majestuoso, creó la creación. Creó a quienes amó de lo que amó, y lo que amó fue crearlos del barro del Paraíso; y creó a quienes odió de lo que odió, y lo que odió fue crearlos del barro del Fuego. Luego los envió a las sombras.
translations.fa: خداوند عزوجل مخلوقات را آفرید. پس کسانی را که دوست می‌داشت از آنچه دوست می‌داشت آفرید و آنچه دوست می‌داشت این بود که آنها را از گِل بهشت آفرید؛ و کسانی را که دشمن می‌داشت از آنچه دشمن می‌داشت آفرید و آنچه دشمن می‌داشت این بود که آنها را از گِل آتش آفرید. سپس آنها را در سایه‌ها مبعوث کرد.
translations.fr: Certes, Allah, Puissant et Majestueux, créa la création. Il créa ceux qu'Il aima à partir de ce qu'Il aimait, et ce qu'Il aimait était de les créer à partir de l'argile du Paradis ; et Il créa ceux qu'Il détestait à partir de ce qu'Il détestait, et ce qu'Il détestait était de les créer à partir de l'argile du Feu. Puis Il les envoya dans les ombres.
translations.id: Sesungguhnya Allah Azza wa Jalla menciptakan makhluk-Nya. Maka Dia menciptakan orang-orang yang Dia cintai dari apa yang Dia cintai, dan apa yang Dia cintai adalah bahwa Dia menciptakan mereka dari tanah liat surga; dan Dia menciptakan orang-orang yang Dia benci dari apa yang Dia benci, dan apa yang Dia benci adalah bahwa Dia menciptakan mereka dari tanah liat neraka. Kemudian Dia mengirim mereka ke alam bayangan.
translations.ru: Поистине, Аллах, Великий и Величественный, создал творения. Он создал тех, кого Он возлюбил, из того, что Он любил, а то, что Он любил — это создать их из глины Рая; и Он создал тех, кого Он возненавидел, из того, что Он ненавидел, а то, что Он ненавидел — это создать их из глины Огня. Затем Он послал их в тени.
translations.tr: Allah Teâlâ mahlukâtı yarattı. Sevdiklerini sevdiği şeyden yarattı ve sevdiği şeyin onları Cennet toprağından yaratmasıydı; nefret ettiklerini ise nefret ettiği şeyden yarattı ve nefret ettiği şeyin onları Cehennem toprağından yaratmasıydı. Sonra onları gölgelere gönderdi.
translations.ur: بے شک اللہ عز و جل نے مخلوقات کو پیدا کیا۔ پس جن سے وہ محبت کرتا تھا انہیں اس چیز سے بنایا جس سے وہ محبت کرتا تھا، اور وہ یہ تھا کہ انہیں جنت کی مٹی سے بنایا؛ اور جن سے وہ نفرت کرتا تھا انہیں اس چیز سے بنایا جس سے وہ نفرت کرتا تھا، اور وہ یہ تھا کہ انہیں جہنم کی مٹی سے بنایا۔ پھر انہیں سائوں میں بھیجا۔
translations.zh: 确实，真主至尊至荣创造了众生。祂将祂所爱之人从祂所爱之物中造出，祂所爱之物是将他们从乐园的泥土中造出；而祂将祂所厌之人从祂所厌之物中造出，祂所厌之物是将他们从火狱的泥土中造出。然后祂将他们派入阴影界。

translations.bn: তখন আমি জিজ্ঞেস করলাম: 'ছায়াগুলি কী?' তিনি বললেন: 'তুমি কি সূর্যের আলোয় তোমার ছায়া দেখোনি? এটি একটি জিনিস, তবু কোনো বাস্তব জিনিস নয়।'
translations.de: Ich fragte: 'Und was sind die Schatten?' Er sagte: 'Siehst du nicht deinen Schatten in der Sonne? Er ist etwas, aber kein wirkliches Ding.'
translations.en: So I asked: 'And what are the shadows?' He said: 'Have you not seen your shadow in the sun — it is something, yet it is not a thing?'
translations.es: Le pregunté: '¿Y qué son las sombras?' Dijo: '¿Acaso no ves tu sombra bajo el sol? Es algo, pero no es una cosa real.'
translations.fa: گفتم: «سایه‌ها چیستند؟» فرمود: «آیا سایه‌ات را در آفتاب ندیده‌ای؟ چیزی است اما چیزی نیست.»
translations.fr: Je demandai : « Et qu'est-ce que les ombres ? » Il dit : « N'as-tu pas vu ton ombre au soleil ? Elle est quelque chose, mais n'est pas une chose réelle. »
translations.id: Maka aku bertanya: 'Apakah alam bayangan itu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidakkah engkau melihat bayanganmu di bawah sinar matahari? Ia adalah sesuatu, namun bukan sesuatu yang nyata.'
translations.ru: Я спросил: «А что такое тени?» Он сказал: «Разве ты не видел свою тень под солнцем? Она есть нечто, но при этом не является вещью.»
translations.tr: Ben de sordum: 'Gölgeler de ne oluyor?' Buyurdu: 'Güneşte kendi gölgeni görmez misin? O bir şeydir, fakat bir şey değildir.'
translations.ur: تو میں نے پوچھا: 'سائے کیا ہیں؟' آپ نے فرمایا: 'کیا تم نے دھوپ میں اپنا سایہ نہیں دیکھا — وہ ایک چیز ہے، پھر بھی کوئی حقیقی چیز نہیں؟'
translations.zh: 于是我问道：「阴影界是什么？」他说：「你难道没有见过自己在阳光下的影子吗？它是某物，然而又不是实体之物。」

translations.bn: তারপর তিনি তাদের মধ্য থেকে নবীদেরকে পাঠালেন এবং তারা তাদেরকে আল্লাহ আজ্জা ওয়া জাল্লার স্বীকৃতির দিকে আহ্বান করলেন — এটাই তাঁর বাণী আজ্জা ওয়া জাল্লা:
translations.de: Dann sandte Er Propheten aus ihrer Mitte und sie luden sie zum Bekenntnis zu Allah, dem Mächtigen und Majestätischen, ein — und das ist Sein Wort, der Mächtige und Majestätische:
translations.en: Then He sent Prophets from among them, and they invited them to the acknowledgment of Allah, Mighty and Majestic — and that is His word, Mighty and Majestic:
translations.es: Luego envió Profetas de entre ellos, y les invitaron al reconocimiento de Allah, Poderoso y Majestuoso — y eso es Su palabra, Poderoso y Majestuoso:
translations.fa: سپس از میان آنها پیامبران را برانگیخت و آنها را به اقرار به خداوند عزوجل دعوت کردند — و این همان قول خداوند عزوجل است:
translations.fr: Puis Il envoya des Prophètes d'entre eux, et ils les invitèrent à la reconnaissance d'Allah, Puissant et Majestueux — et c'est Sa parole, Puissant et Majestueux :
translations.id: Kemudian Dia mengutus Nabi-Nabi dari antara mereka, dan mereka mengajak untuk mengakui Allah Azza wa Jalla — dan itu adalah firman-Nya yang Agung:
translations.ru: Затем Он послал из их числа Пророков, и они призвали их к признанию Аллаха, Великого и Величественного — и это Его слово, Великого и Величественного:
translations.tr: Sonra onların arasından Peygamberleri gönderdi; onlar da Allah Teâlâ'yı ikrar etmeye davet ettiler — Bu O'nun şu sözüdür:
translations.ur: پھر اللہ نے ان میں سے انبیاء کو بھیجا اور انہوں نے انہیں اللہ عز و جل کے اقرار کی طرف بلایا — اور یہ اللہ عز و جل کا فرمان ہے:
translations.zh: 然后祂从他们中派遣了众先知，他们召唤众人承认真主至尊至荣——这正是祂至尊至荣的言辞：

translations.bn: "তুমি তাদেরকে জিজ্ঞেস করলে কে তাদেরকে সৃষ্টি করেছে, তারা অবশ্যই বলবে আল্লাহ।" [43:87]
translations.de: "Und wenn du sie fragst, wer sie erschaffen hat, würden sie gewiss sagen: Allah." [43:87]
translations.en: "And if you ask them who created them, they would certainly say: Allah." [43:87]
translations.es: "Y si les preguntas quién los creó, ciertamente dirán: Allah." [43:87]
translations.fa: «و اگر از آنها بپرسی چه کسی آنها را آفریده حتماً خواهند گفت الله.» [43:87]
translations.fr: « Et si tu leur demandes qui les a créés, ils diront certainement : Allah. » [43:87]
translations.id: "Dan jika engkau bertanya kepada mereka siapa yang menciptakan mereka, mereka pasti akan berkata: Allah." [43:87]
translations.ru: «И если ты спросишь их, кто их создал, они непременно скажут: Аллах.» [43:87]
translations.tr: "Ve onlara kim onları yarattı diye sorsanız elbette Allah derler." [43:87]
translations.ur: ''اور اگر تم ان سے پوچھو کہ انہیں کس نے پیدا کیا تو وہ یقیناً کہیں گے اللہ نے۔'' [43:87]
translations.zh: 「你若问他们是谁创造了他们，他们必然说：真主。」[43:87]

translations.bn: তারপর তারা তাদেরকে নবীদের স্বীকৃতির দিকে আহ্বান করলেন; কেউ কেউ স্বীকার করল এবং কেউ কেউ অস্বীকার করল। তারপর তারা তাদেরকে আমাদের ওয়ালায়াতের দিকে আহ্বান করলেন; আল্লাহর শপথ, যে ভালোবাসল সে স্বীকার করল এবং যে ঘৃণা করল সে অস্বীকার করল। এটাই তাঁর বাণী:
translations.de: Dann luden sie sie zum Bekenntnis der Propheten ein; einige bekannten und andere leugneten. Dann luden sie sie zu unserer Wilaya ein, und, bei Gott, derjenige, der liebte, bekannte sie und derjenige, der hasste, leugnete sie. Und das ist Sein Wort:
translations.en: Then they invited them to the acknowledgment of the Prophets; some acknowledged and some denied. Then they invited them to our Wilayah, and, by God, the one who loved acknowledged it, and the one who hated denied it. And that is His word:
translations.es: Luego les invitaron al reconocimiento de los Profetas; algunos reconocieron y otros negaron. Luego les invitaron a nuestra Wilaya, y, por Dios, quien amó la reconoció y quien odió la negó. Y esa es Su palabra:
translations.fa: سپس آنها را به اقرار به پیامبران دعوت کردند؛ برخی اقرار کردند و برخی انکار کردند. سپس آنها را به ولایت ما دعوت کردند؛ به خدا قسم کسی که دوست می‌داشت اقرار کرد و کسی که دشمن می‌داشت انکار کرد. و این همان قول اوست:
translations.fr: Puis ils les invitèrent à la reconnaissance des Prophètes ; certains reconnurent et d'autres nièrent. Puis ils les invitèrent à notre Wilaya, et, par Dieu, celui qui aimait la reconnut et celui qui haïssait la nia. Et c'est Sa parole :
translations.id: Kemudian mereka mengajak kepada pengakuan para Nabi; sebagian mengakui dan sebagian mengingkari. Kemudian mereka mengajak kepada Wilayah kami, maka demi Allah, orang yang mencintai mengakuinya dan orang yang membenci mengingkarinya. Dan itulah firman-Nya:
translations.ru: Затем они призвали их к признанию Пророков; часть признала, а часть отвергла. Затем они призвали их к нашей Вилайат, и, клянусь Аллахом, тот, кто любил, признал её, а тот, кто ненавидел, отверг её. И это Его слово:
translations.tr: Sonra onları Peygamberleri ikrar etmeye davet ettiler; bir kısmı kabul etti, bir kısmı inkâr etti. Sonra onları bizim velayetimizi kabule davet ettiler; Allah'a yemin olsun, seven kabul etti, nefret eden inkâr etti. Ve bu O'nun şu sözüdür:
translations.ur: پھر انہوں نے انہیں انبیاء کے اقرار کی طرف بلایا تو ان میں سے بعض نے اقرار کیا اور بعض نے انکار کیا۔ پھر انہوں نے انہیں ہماری ولایت کی طرف بلایا تو خدا کی قسم جس نے محبت کی اس نے اقرار کیا اور جس نے نفرت کی اس نے انکار کیا۔ اور یہ اللہ کا فرمان ہے:
translations.zh: 然后他们召唤众人承认众先知，其中一些人承认了，另一些人否认了。然后他们召唤众人接受我们的威拉亚，凭真主，那爱的人承认了，那恨的人否认了。这正是祂的话语：

translations.bn: "তারা সেটায় বিশ্বাস আনবে না যা তারা আগে মিথ্যা বলেছিল।" [10:74]
translations.de: "Sie würden nicht an das glauben, was sie zuvor geleugnet hatten." [10:74]
translations.en: "But they were not going to believe in what they had belied before." [10:74]
translations.es: "No iban a creer en lo que habían desmentido antes." [10:74]
translations.fa: «آنها به آنچه قبلاً تکذیب کرده بودند ایمان نمی‌آوردند.» [10:74]
translations.fr: « Ils n'allaient pas croire en ce qu'ils avaient rejeté avant. » [10:74]
translations.id: "Mereka tidak akan beriman kepada apa yang mereka dustakan sebelumnya." [10:74]
translations.ru: «Они не собирались уверовать в то, что отвергли прежде.» [10:74]
translations.tr: "Onlar, daha önce yalanladıkları şeye inanmayacaklardı." [10:74]
translations.ur: ''وہ اس پر ایمان نہیں لائیں گے جس کو انہوں نے پہلے جھٹلایا تھا۔'' [10:74]
translations.zh: 「他们本不会相信他们以前所否认的事。」[10:74]

translations.bn: তারপর আবু জাফর আলাইহিস সালাম বললেন: 'সেই অস্বীকারটি সেখানেই ছিল।'
translations.de: Dann sagte Abu Ja'far (Friede sei mit ihm): 'Das Leugnen war damals (schon da).'
translations.en: Then Abu Ja'far (peace be upon him) said: 'The denial was there (at that time).'
translations.es: Entonces Abu Ja'far (la paz sea con él) dijo: 'La negación estaba allí (desde entonces).'
translations.fa: سپس ابوجعفر علیه السلام فرمود: «تکذیب در آنجا بود.»
translations.fr: Puis Abu Ja'far (que la paix soit sur lui) dit : « Le déni était là (dès ce moment-là). »
translations.id: Kemudian Abu Ja'far alaihis salam berkata: 'Pendustaan itu memang terjadi saat itu.'
translations.ru: Затем Абу Джа'фар (мир ему) сказал: «Отрицание было тогда (ещё в то время).»
translations.tr: Sonra Ebu Cafer (a.s.) buyurdu: 'İnkâr o vakit vardı.'
translations.ur: پھر ابو جعفر علیہ السلام نے فرمایا: 'تکذیب اسی وقت سے تھی۔'
translations.zh: 然后阿布·贾法尔（愿主赐他平安）说：「那时候的否认便是（此后否认的根源）。」

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنْ صَالِحِ بْنِ عُقْبَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْجُعْفِيِّ وَعُقْبَةَ جَمِيعاً عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ خَلَقَ الْخَلْقَ فَخَلَقَ مَنْ أَحَبَّ مِمَّا أَحَبَّ وَكَانَ مَا أَحَبَّ أَنْ خَلَقَهُ مِنْ طِينَةِ الْجَنَّةِ وَخَلَقَ مَنْ أَبْغَضَ مِمَّا أَبْغَضَ وَكَانَ مَا أَبْغَضَ أَنْ خَلَقَهُ مِنْ طِينَةِ النَّارِ ثُمَّ بَعَثَهُمْ فِي الظِّلَالِ فَقُلْتُ وَأَيُّ شَيْءٍ الظِّلَالُ فَقَالَ أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى ظِلِّكَ فِي الشَّمْسِ شَيْئاً وَلَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ ثُمَّ بَعَثَ مِنْهُمُ النَّبِيِّينَ فَدَعَوْهُمْ إِلَى الْإِقْرَارِ بِاللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ وَهُوَ قَوْلُهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ وَلَئِنْ سَأَلْتَهُمْ مَنْ خَلَقَهُمْ لَيَقُولُنَّ اللَّهُ ثُمَّ دَعَوْهُمْ إِلَى الْإِقْرَارِ بِالنَّبِيِّينَ فَأَقَرَّ بَعْضُهُمْ وَأَنْكَرَ بَعْضٌ ثُمَّ دَعَوْهُمْ إِلَى وَلَايَتِنَا فَأَقَرَّ بِهَا وَاللَّهِ مَنْ أَحَبَّ وَأَنْكَرَهَا مَنْ أَبْغَضَ وَهُوَ قَوْلُهُ فَمَا كَانُوا لِيُؤْمِنُوا بِمَا كَذَّبُوا بِهِ مِنْ قَبْلُ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ كَانَ التَّكْذِيبُ ثَمَّ

seo_questions.es: ¿Qué enseñó el Imam al-Baqir sobre la creación de las almas del barro del Paraíso y del Fuego?
seo_questions.fa: امام باقر درباره آفرینش ارواح از گل بهشت و آتش چه فرمودند؟

similar_content_hints.description: Hadiths about the pre-existential covenant (mithaq) of Alast where souls acknowledged God's lordship before entering the physical world, typically referencing Quran 7:172.
Narrations about souls being created from the clay of different cosmic substances before birth into the physical world, distinguishing between the clay of believers and disbelievers.
Hadiths about the world of shadows ('alam al-zill or 'alam al-dharr) as the realm of pre-physical souls that was prior to the material world.

summaries.bn: ইমাম আল-বাকির (আ.) একটি কসমোলজিক্যাল শিক্ষায় বর্ণনা করেছেন যে আল্লাহ আজলে ভালোবাসা আত্মাগুলিকে জান্নাতের মাটি থেকে এবং ঘৃণা করা আত্মাগুলিকে জাহান্নামের মাটি থেকে সৃষ্টি করেছেন। তারপর তাদেরকে ছায়ার জগতে পাঠানো হয়েছিল এবং নবীদের মাধ্যমে তাদেরকে তাওহীদ, নবুওয়াত ও আহলুল বাইতের ওয়ালায়াত স্বীকার করতে ডাকা হয়েছিল। ওয়ালায়াত অস্বীকার করা সেই ক্ষেত্রে আদি অস্বীকারের ধারাবাহিকতা।
summaries.de: Imam al-Baqir (F) überliefert eine kosmologische Lehre über die ur-zeitliche Differenzierung der Seelen: die von Gott geliebten wurden aus dem Lehm des Paradieses erschaffen, die verhassten aus dem Lehm des Feuers. Sie wurden in die Schattenwelt gesandt und durch Propheten eingeladen, Gott, die Propheten und die Wilaya der Ahl al-Bayt zu bekennen. Die Ablehnung der Wilaya in diesem Leben ist die Fortsetzung der urzeitlichen Leugnung, die in der Natur des Lehms verankert ist.
summaries.en: Imam al-Baqir (peace be upon him) narrates a cosmological teaching about the pre-eternal differentiation of souls: those beloved by God were created from the clay of Paradise, while those despised were created from the clay of Fire. God then sent them into the realm of shadows ('alam al-zill) — the pre-physical world of forms — and thereafter raised Prophets to invite them to acknowledge God, the Prophets, and ultimately the Wilayah (divinely appointed guardianship) of the Ahl al-Bayt. The hadith anchors the Shia doctrine of divine predetermination in a primordial covenant, explaining that those who reject Wilayah in this life had already rejected it in the pre-existential realm — their denial is thus a continuation of ancient opposition rooted in the nature of their clay.
summaries.es: El Imam al-Baqir (P) transmite una enseñanza cosmológica sobre la diferenciación primordial de las almas: las que Dios amaba fueron creadas del barro del Paraíso, mientras que las que aborrecía fueron creadas del barro del Fuego. Luego las envió al mundo de las sombras y les invitó a través de los Profetas a reconocer a Dios, los Profetas y la Wilaya de Ahlulbayt. La negación de la Wilaya en esta vida es una continuación del rechazo primordial inscrito en la naturaleza de la arcilla.
summaries.fa: امام باقر علیه السلام یک آموزش کیهانی درباره تمایز ازلی ارواح بیان می‌فرمایند: دوست‌داشته‌شدگان از گل بهشت و دشمن‌داشته‌شدگان از گل آتش آفریده شدند. خداوند آنها را به عالم سایه‌ها فرستاد و سپس از طریق پیامبران به توحید، نبوت و ولایت آل بیت دعوت کرد. انکار ولایت ادامه همان تکذیب ازلی است که در سرشت برخی انسان‌ها نهفته است.
summaries.fr: L'Imam al-Baqir (P) transmet un enseignement cosmologique sur la différenciation primordiale des âmes : celles qu'Allah aimait furent créées de l'argile du Paradis, tandis que celles qu'Il détestait furent créées de l'argile du Feu. Il les envoya ensuite dans le monde des ombres, puis, par les Prophètes, les invita à reconnaître Allah, les Prophètes et la Wilaya des Ahl al-Bayt. Le déni de la Wilaya dans cette vie est la continuation du rejet primordial inscrit dans la nature de l'argile.
summaries.id: Imam al-Baqir (a.s.) mengajarkan kosmologi tentang penciptaan ruh-ruh sebelum dunia: mereka yang dicintai Allah diciptakan dari tanah surga, sedangkan yang dibenci dari tanah neraka. Mereka diutus ke alam bayangan sebelum dunia fisik, kemudian para Nabi mengajak mereka untuk mengakui Allah, kenabian, dan Wilayah Ahlulbayt. Pengingkaran Wilayah di dunia ini merupakan kelanjutan dari pendustaan yang terjadi di alam pra-eksistensi.
summaries.ru: Имам аль-Бакир (мир ему) передаёт космологическое учение о предвечном разграничении душ: те, кого Аллах возлюбил, были созданы из глины Рая, а те, кого Он возненавидел, — из глины Огня. Их отправили в мир теней, а затем через Пророков призывали признать Аллаха, Пророков и Вилайат Ахл аль-Бейт. Отрицание Вилайат в земной жизни — это продолжение изначального отвержения, укоренённого в природе глины.
summaries.tr: İmam Bakır (a.s.) ruhların ezeli yaratılışını anlatan kozmolojik bir öğreti aktarmaktadır: sevilen ruhlar Cennet toprağından, nefret edilenler ise Cehennem toprağından yaratılmıştır. Ruhlar önce gölgeler alemine gönderilmiş, ardından Peygamberler aracılığıyla Allah'ı, Peygamberleri ve Ehl-i Beyt'in velayetini kabule davet edilmiştir. Velayeti reddedenler, bu reddi önceden ezelde yapmışlardır.
summaries.ur: امام باقر علیہ السلام نے ارواح کی ازلی تخلیق کے بارے میں ایک کائناتی تعلیم بیان فرمائی: جن سے خدا محبت کرتا ہے انہیں جنت کی مٹی سے اور جن سے نفرت کرتا ہے انہیں جہنم کی مٹی سے بنایا گیا۔ پھر ارواح کو سائوں کی دنیا میں بھیجا گیا اور انبیاء کے ذریعے انہیں خدا، انبیاء اور آل بیت کی ولایت کے اقرار کی طرف بلایا گیا۔ ولایت کا انکار اس ازلی تکذیب کا تسلسل ہے جو فطرت میں پیوست تھی۔
summaries.zh: 伊玛目巴基尔（愿主赐他平安）传述了一段关于灵魂前定分化的宇宙论教诲：真主所爱之人从乐园泥土造出，所厌之人从火狱泥土造出。祂将他们派入阴影界，尔后通过众先知召唤他们承认真主、接受先知权威，最终承认圣裔家族的威拉亚。今世对威拉亚的否认，是那源于泥土本性的远古否认之延续。

translation.ur: تو انہوں نے انہیں دعوت دی

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (30/ 7)
text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ خَلَقَ الْخَلْقَ فَخَلَقَ مَنْ أَحَبَّ مِمَّا أَحَبَّ وَ كَانَ مَا أَحَبَّ أَنْ خَلَقَهُ مِنْ طِينَةِ الْجَنَّةِ وَ خَلَقَ مَنْ أَبْغَضَ مِمَّا أَبْغَضَ وَ كَانَ مَا أَبْغَضَ أَنْ خَلَقَهُ مِنْ طِينَةِ النَّارِ ثُمَّ بَعَثَهُمْ فِي الظِّلَالِ فَقُلْتُ وَ أَيُّ شَيْ‏ءٍ الظِّلَالُ فَقَالَ أَ لَمْ تَرَ إِلَى ظِلِّكَ فِي الشَّمْسِ شَيْئاً وَ لَيْسَ بِشَيْ‏ءٍ

ثُمَّ بَعَثَ مِنْهُمُ النَّبِيِّينَ فَدَعَوْهُمْ إِلَى الْإِقْرَارِ بِاللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ هُوَ قَوْلُهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ لَئِنْ سَأَلْتَهُمْ مَنْ خَلَقَهُمْ لَيَقُولُنَّ اللَّهُ ثُمَّ دَعَوْهُمْ إِلَى الْإِقْرَارِ بِالنَّبِيِّينَ فَأَقَرَّ بَعْضُهُمْ وَ أَنْكَرَ بَعْضٌ ثُمَّ دَعَوْهُمْ إِلَى وَلَايَتِنَا فَأَقَرَّ بِهَا وَ اللَّهِ مَنْ أَحَبَّ وَ أَنْكَرَهَا مَنْ أَبْغَضَ وَ هُوَ قَوْلُهُ فَما كانُوا لِيُؤْمِنُوا بِما كَذَّبُوا بِهِ مِنْ قَبْلُ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) كَانَ التَّكْذِيبُ ثَمَّ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Salih Bin Uqba, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad Al Juf’y, and Uqba altogether,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Created the creatures. So He<sup>azwj</sup> Created the ones He<sup>azwj</sup> Loved from what He<sup>azwj</sup> Loved, and whatever He<sup>azwj</sup> Loved He<sup>azwj</sup>, Created it from the clay of the Paradise; and He<sup>azwj</sup> Created the ones He<sup>azwj</sup> Hated from what He<sup>azwj</sup> Hated, and whatever He<sup>azwj</sup> Hated, Created it from the clay of the Fire. Then He<sup>azwj</sup> Sent them into the shadows’. So I said, ‘And which thing is the shadow?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do you not see your own shadow in the sunshine? It is something, but is not a thing’.

Then Heazwj Sent Prophetsas from them, and theyas invited them to the acknowledgment in Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic, and these are the Words of the Mighty and Majestic [43:87] And if you should ask them who created them, they would certainly say: Allah. Then Heazwj Invited them to the acknowledgement in the Prophetsas. So some of them acknowledged, and some denied. Then Heazwj Invited them to ourasws Wilayah, So he acknowledge in it, By Allahazwj, the one whom Heazwj Loved, and he denied it, the one whom Heazwj Hated, and these are Hisazwj Words [10:74] but they were not going to believe in what they had belied in beforehand’. Then Abu Ja’farasws said: ‘The belying (in usasws) was (from) then’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Muhammad ibn ‘Isma’il from Salih ibn ‘Aqaba from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muhammad al-Ju’fi and ‘Aqaba together from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “Allah, the Majestic, the Glorious, created the creation. He created His most beloved ones from that which He loved most. What was most beloved to Him was the fact that he created His most beloved ones from the clay of paradise. He created those whom He hated most from that which he hated most. What was most hated to Him was the fact that he created from the clay of the fire and then sent them to the shadows. I asked him, ‘What are the shadows?’ He replied, ‘Have you not seen your own shadow in a sunny day that looks like a thing but is nothing? Allah then raised from them the prophets who called them to believe in Allah, the Majestic, the Glorious, as mentioned in His, words, “When you ask them who has created them they will say, ‘Allah.” [31:25] He then called them to express their belief in the prophets. Some expressed their belief as such and others among them did not do so. He then called them to express their (Wala’) belief and support to us (A hi al-Bayt). I swear by Allah, those whom He loved expressed their belief that we were the people who possess Divine Authority and only those whom He hated refused to express such beliefs as it is said in the following verse of the Holy Quran. “They do not express faith in what they before had refused to have faith in.’” [7:101] Abu Ja’far (a.s.) then said, ‘Rejection (to have faith in us) was then.’”
